archetype_description: Traditional Temple Heritage - Warm, reverent, authoritative, utilizing saffron, maroon, and cream.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main containers, rounded-xl for inner cards to maintain soft, organic feel.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar_strategy: Magic Curve Sidebar: Sidebar container has maroon gradient `bg-gradient-to-b from-[#721C24] to-[#4A1016]`. Main content area has `bg-[#FDFBF7]` and `rounded-tl-[2.5rem]` to create the curve effect.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Protocol Mode B. Tight gap-6. Mix of tall (col-span-1 row-span-2) for WhatsApp logs, and wide (col-span-2) for video player / complaints list.

components.cards: Surface strategy: 'Neumorphism tactile variant but clean'. Solid #FFFFFF background, subtle shadow-sm, 1px top border of saffron/gold (`border-t-2 border-t-[#F4C430]`) on key metric cards.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#721C24] text-white hover:bg-[#5A161C] rounded-lg. Secondary: bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#721C24] text-[#721C24].
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Clean rows with hover:bg-[#FFF9E6]. Header text small, uppercase, tracking-wider.
components.video_player: Clean theater mode within a card. No heavy gradients around it. Use solid dark background (`bg-slate-900`) for the player container to increase contrast.
components.badges: Status badges: Resolved (bg-[#E6F4EA] text-[#1E7E34]), In Progress (bg-[#FFF4E5] text-[#DD6B20]), Rejected (bg-[#FDE8E8] text-[#C53030]).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift slightly `-translate-y-1` with increased shadow `shadow-md`. Buttons show a slight scale `scale-[0.98]` on active.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a cleaner, more elegant look.

login_background.description: Stunning view of the intricate architecture of a Hindu temple. Use as a blurred or dark-overlay background for the admin login.

display_screen_hero.description: Traditional diya lamps glowing. Good for a calm, spiritual loading state or idle screen on the Temple TV.

temple_placeholder.description: Large brick temple building. Use as a fallback image for temple profiles.

testing.rules: All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="complaint-resolve-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Magic Curve Sidebar' by setting the body/root background to the maroon gradient, and the main `<main>` content area to `bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-tl-[2.5rem] p-8` with `min-h-screen`.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout structure. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Select, Dialogs).
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Strictly use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body.
Do not use dark mode. Stick to the traditional Light theme with maroon and cream.
For the Temple TV Display screen, use a bold, high-contrast bento grid layout with large typography so it's readable from a distance.
